release_notes:
- NEW: KioskKeeperService - Foreground service that constantly monitors app state
- NEW: Automatically brings rental app back when HOME button is pressed
- NEW: Works every 1 second to check if our app is in foreground
- NEW: If another app is foreground, brings rental app back immediately
- IMPROVED: Specifically designed for MIUI/Redmi devices
- IMPROVED: Apps like Chrome stay alive in background (not killed)
- IMPROVED: No 'unpin' dialogs, no blocked app launching
- IMPROVED: Uses FLAG_ACTIVITY_REORDER_TO_FRONT (doesn't restart app)
- FIXED: HOME button no longer kills rental app on MIUI
- FIXED: Rental app always returns within 1 second of HOME press
- NOTE: Runs as foreground service with silent notification
- NOTE: Requires SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW permission for overlay
